para_trans: regarding the cancellation of the transfer.
GOVERNMENT ORDER NO. - LTS-2026 / Q.No.900 / SERVICE-2... (3)
Madam Kama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Batch: - Department of Public Works, Government Order No. LTS: -2026 / P.No.78 / Service-2, D. 27/05/2026.

The engineers mentioned in the following table under the Government Order in reference are referred to in Column No. 4 Here the position shown in front of his name was replaced by a posting. However, for administrative reasons, transfers made under the relevant Government Order to the engineers mentioned in the following table with the approval of the competent authority are being cancelled under this order.
This Government Order has been made available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
